title: stelis euspatha
intro: Stelis euspatha, also known as the orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Stelis euspatha include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce cholesterol levels. Stelis euspatha can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
